description_for_human: Scans Outlook emails and extracts sorted/unsorted table counts per database.
description_for_model: Use this plugin when the user asks about database table information from their emails. It reads recent emails and returns structured data about how many sorted and unsorted tables exist per database.

functions.name: scanInboxForDBTables
functions.description: Reads the user's recent Outlook emails and extracts database names along with their sorted and unsorted table counts. Returns a JSON list of databases with counts.

database_name.description: Optional. Filter results to a specific database name. If not provided, returns all databases found.

email_count.description: Number of recent emails to scan. Defaults to 20. Maximum 50.
